title: The Essential Guide to Characters

'''''The Essential Guide to Characters''''' is a reference book published by [[Del Rey]] in [[October]] [[1995]]. It was written by [[Andy Mangels]] and illustrated by [[Michael Butkus]].

The book provides biographical information on characters from throughout the ''[[Star Wars]]'' saga, drawn from sources both well-known and obscure.

''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'', an updated version of the book, was published in [[2002]] to include characters from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] novel series, and other sources.

At [[Celebration V]], [[Pablo Hidalgo]] announced a [[The Essential Characters|third edition]] of ''Characters'', authored by [[Daniel Wallace]], and gave a release date of 2013 at [[Celebration VI]]. However, this book was eventually canceled.
